{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# UDDB2B6.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

UDDB2B6.sys is a TechPowerUp kernel driver (GPU-Z variant) that exposes I/O port read/write, MSR read/write, MmMapIoSpace map/unmap/read/write, and PCI configuration space read/write. TechPowerUp has a history of vulnerable kernel drivers including GPU-Z.sys (CVE-2019-7245, CVE-2025-5324) and ThrottleStop.sys (CVE-2025-7771). The driver is available in the KeServiceDescriptorTable/vulnerable-drivers repository.
- **UUID**: 886af494-4087-48c9-b48f-53e638d6f62e
- **Created**: 2026-04-17
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint](https://twitter.com/@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/d4320487bf3021f2f2afcfc43d652a69.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "UDDB2B6.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create UDDB2B6 binPath=C:\windows\temp\UDDB2B6.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start UDDB2B6
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |
